title: UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10th 12th Result 2026 - Overview

detail.title: UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10th 12th Result 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10TH 12TH result 2026 is expected in the fourth week of April 2026. Check latest updates, direct result link, step‑by‑step process, pass criteria, scrutiny and compartment details here.

content.text: UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10th 12th Result 2026 is expected to be released in the fourth week of April 2026. Students will be able to check their marks online using their roll number on the official result portal. The Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE), Ramnagar, will publish the Class 10 (High School) and Class 12 (Intermediate) results in online mode for all registered students.

The UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10TH 12TH result 2026 will be made available on the official websites, where candidates can download their provisional marksheets, verify subject‑wise scores, and use the scorecard for admission to the next class or higher studies. Once the result link is activated in the fourth week of April 2026, students should visit the official portal, enter their roll number exactly as printed on the admit card, and save a copy of the online marksheet for future reference.

The Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE), Ramnagar, is likely to release the Class 10 (High School) and Class 12 (Intermediate) board exam results online in April 2026, and as per various media and portal reports, the declaration is expected around the third to fourth week of April 2026. Students will be able to check UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10TH 12TH result 2026 using their roll number on the official result portals.

rows: Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE), Ramnagar
Class 10: February 23 to March 20, 2026; Class 12: February 21 to March 20, 2026
April 2026, tentatively in the third to fourth week of April 2026
Roll number (and other details if asked)

sections.heading: Expected UBSE Uttarakhand Result Date 2026 (4th Week of April)

content.text: Several education news portals and result platforms have reported that the UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10TH 12TH result 2026 is expected to be declared in April 2026, with a strong possibility around the third or fourth week of the month, based on past trends. Last year, UBSE declared Class 10 and Class 12 board results on April 19, 2025, at 11 am, which also supports the expectation of a similar April window in 2026.

items: UBSE main website: ubse.uk.gov.in

sections.heading: How to Check UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10th 12th Result 2026 Online

content.text: Once the UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10TH 12TH result 2026 link is activated, students can follow these steps on the official portal.

items: Visit the official result website: ubse.uk.gov.in.
On the homepage, click on either: “Uttarakhand Board Class 10 Result 2026” or “Uttarakhand Board Class 12 Result 2026”.
“Uttarakhand Board Class 10 Result 2026” or “Uttarakhand Board Class 12 Result 2026”.
Enter your roll number and other required details exactly as printed on the admit card.
Click on the “Get Result” or similar button.
Your online marksheet for UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10TH 12TH result 2026 will appear on the screen.
Download the marksheet PDF and take a printout for future use (until you receive the original mark sheet from your school).

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on UBSE 10th & 12th Online Marksheet

content.text: The online scorecard available after UBSE Uttarakhand Board 10TH 12TH result 2026 declaration will carry important academic details.

items: Student’s name
Roll number and registration/application number
Father’s and mother’s name
Class and stream (for Class 12 – Science/Arts/Commerce if applicable)
School name and code
Subject‑wise marks (theory and practical, where applicable)
Total marks and percentage
Result status (Pass / Fail / Compartment)
Division or grade, as per board rules

content.text: The online marksheet is provisional and students must collect the original mark sheet and passing certificate from their respective schools.
